title: PSTET Admit Card 2026 OUT - Download Hall Ticket at pstet2025.org

detail.title: PSTET Admit Card 2026 OUT - Download Hall Ticket at pstet2025.org
detail.short_info: Download PSTET Admit Card 2026 released on 9 March at pstet2025.org. Exam on 15 March. Get direct link, steps & exam details.

sections.heading: PSTET Admit Card 2026 OUT - Download Hall Ticket at pstet2025.org

content.text: PSTET Admit Card 2026 has been released by the State Council of Educational Research and Training (SCERT), Punjab on 9 March 2026. Candidates who applied for the Punjab State Teacher Eligibility Test (PSTET) can download their admit card from the official website pstet2025.org. The written examination is scheduled for 15 March 2026 (Sunday) in offline mode across various centers in Punjab. This hall ticket is mandatory for appearing in the exam. Read below for the direct download link, step-by-step process, exam details, and important instructions for PSTET Admit Card 2026.

sections.heading: PSTET Admit Card 2026 - Direct Download Link

rows: State Council of Educational Research and Training (SCERT), Punjab

sections.heading: How to Download PSTET Admit Card 2026?

content.text: Follow these simple steps to download your PSTET Admit Card 2026:

items: Step 1: Visit the official PSTET website at pstet2025.org or click the direct download link provided above
Step 2: Go to the Candidate Login section or look for the "Admit Card Download" link
Step 3: Click on "PSTET Admit Card 2026" or related link
Step 4: Enter your credentials: Application/Registration Number Password / Date of Birth Captcha Code
Step 6: Your PSTET Admit Card 2026 will appear on screen
Step 7: Download and save the PDF file on your device
Step 8: Take 2-3 printouts for exam day (keep backup copies)

content.text: Pro Tip: Check all details on your admit card immediately after download. Report any discrepancies to the PSTET helpdesk within 24 hours.
Your PSTET Admit Card 2026 will contain the following information:

items: Exam Name: Punjab State Teacher Eligibility Test
Exam Center Name and Complete Address
Documents to carry on exam day
Items allowed and not allowed in examination hall

sections.heading: Documents Required on PSTET Exam Day
